tools.name: get_pricing
tools.description: Fetch current LMX Cloud per-call pricing catalog.

tools.name: quote_price
tools.description: Estimate USDC cost for a single model call. Uses GET /v1/pricing with model and token params.

tools.name: list_models
tools.description: List currently supported LMX model aliases and providers.

tools.name: get_status
tools.description: Fetch LMX Cloud provider health, fallback chain, and anchoring status.

tools.name: get_balance
tools.description: Fetch USD credit balance for the caller API key. Requires authentication.

tools.name: get_usage
tools.description: Fetch request and token usage totals for the caller API key. Requires authentication.

tools.name: web_search
tools.description: Real-time web search via LMX (Brave Search passthrough). Fixed per-call USDC price from the caller's API key balance. Returns title/url/snippet results.

tools.name: chat_completion
tools.description: Call LMX Cloud OpenAI-compatible chat completions. Prefers a pre-funded API key (Bearer / api_key); when omitted and x402 is enabled, requires a USDC pay-per-call payment. Optional image_url / images enable vision input (OpenAI content-parts format) — use a vision model such as llama-3.2-90b-vision,

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "chat_completion" references sensitive artifacts (api_key, bearer). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.
